    "Excavation/digging initiated without active 811 utility locate ticket",
    "Lack of physical locate markings (paint, flags) in the active work zone"

    "Stop all excavation and digging operations immediately",

    "Verify all utility clearances and receive positive response confirmation before resuming work"

  "rationale": "Digging without an active 811 locate ticket is a severe safety violation and non-compliant with CGA Best Practices. It presents a critical risk of striking underground electrical, gas, water, or communication lines, threatening life safety and project infrastructure.",

    "OSHA 29 CFR 1926.651(b)"
